title: Google AI Studio & Vertex AI — From Concepts to Hands-On
description: Learn about Vertex AI and Google AI Studio, then use Gemini to generate content live.

tasks.title: Generative AI Capabilities in Vertex AI
Open Google AI Studio in the Browser
tasks.sonic_prompt: Now let me show you Google AI Studio in action. Watch as I open the browser and navigate to the platform.

subtasks.title: Open Firefox browser
subtasks.sonic_prompt: First, I will open the Firefox browser.
subtasks.goal: Open the Firefox browser on the desktop. Look for the Firefox icon in the taskbar or application menu.

subtasks.title: Navigate to Google AI Studio
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will navigate to Google AI Studio.
subtasks.goal: In the Firefox browser address bar, type https://aistudio.google.com/prompts/new_chat and press Enter. Wait for the page to load.

tasks.title: Chat with Gemini in AI Studio
tasks.sonic_prompt: Now let me type a prompt and run it using Gemini inside AI Studio.

subtasks.title: Type a prompt in the chat
subtasks.sonic_prompt: I will type a prompt asking Gemini to explain something.
subtasks.goal: Find the chat input text box at the bottom of the Google AI Studio page. Click on it and type: Explain what Vertex AI is and list 3 key features in bullet points.

subtasks.title: Click Run to generate the response
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will click the Run button to send the prompt to Gemini.
subtasks.goal: Find and click the Run button (blue button) on the Google AI Studio page to submit the prompt and generate a response. The button may say 'Run' or show a play/send icon.
